content.heroQuote: 3,000 tickets a day. How much revenue are you leaving on the table without knowing why?
content.heroSubtext: ABBA Voyage has the data. Milo makes it instant — no analysts, no wait, no Power BI licence required.

clientQuestions.question: How did we perform by ticket type yesterday — floor, premium, auditorium — and which is tracking behind last week?
What drove the dip in ATP last month, and how do we explain it to the board without spending a week on it?
Which day of the week consistently underperforms on revenue per transaction, and what is driving it?
What is our no-show rate broken down by ticket category, and has it shifted since Premium launched?
Which markets are our fastest-growing sources of international bookings — and are we pricing optimally for them?
Once Fabric ingests F&B and merch data, which show nights have the highest secondary spend per head?

solutionHighlights.benefit: Milo connects directly to Microsoft Fabric and answers questions the moment your data lands — no refresh cycle, no lag.

solutionHighlights.feature: Board packs in minutes, not days
solutionHighlights.benefit: Ask Milo for the monthly narrative, get a shareable PDF. Barry sends it; the analyst stays on higher-value work.
CFO, COO, CEO — anyone gets a personalised dashboard via a link. No Power BI seat required.

customAddOns: Zendesk integration for customer service insight
Teams notifications for daily sales alerts

relevantCaseStudy.result: Monthly reporting time cut from 4 days to 45 minutes. Leadership now runs their own ad-hoc queries without analyst support.
